productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Light Winter Purple Tops
description: CompositionDeep purple sleeveless top made of 100% cotton, with a keyhole neckline secured by a metallic button and has a ruffle bibFitRegularWash careonly hand wash in cool waterDo not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry cleanTurn inside out and dry flat in shadeWarm iron, but do not iron on print or embroideryOozing feminity, this purple top from united colors of benetton is perfect for those women who never compromise on style and comfort.
